zh.Titchmarsh, Northamptonshire, England: 英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾鐵其馬緒
zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Lovell於1413年出生在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾時，她的父親Sir John Lovell38歲，母親Eleanor la Zouche53歲。她於大約1433年與Anders Pedersen Gyldenstierne a.k.a. Sir Andrew Ogarde在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1460年在英國巴金哈姆爾享年47歲。

zh-hans.Titchmarsh, Northamptonshire, England: 英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾鐵其馬緒
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice Lovell于1413年出生在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾时，她的父亲Sir John Lovell38岁，母亲Eleanor la Zouche53岁。她于大约1433年与Anders Pedersen Gyldenstierne a.k.a. Sir Andrew Ogarde在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1460年在英国巴金哈姆爾享年47岁。

nameMeanings.name: Lovell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: nickname from Anglo-Norman French lovel ‘wolf cub’, a diminutive of lou, love ‘wolf’. Compare Love and Low .

variants.name: Lowell
meanings: English: variant of Lovell , derived from Anglo-Norman Frenchlou ‘wolf’ + the diminutive suffix -el.

History: Lowell is the surname of one of America's most distinguished NewEngland families, which have been prominent for over 200 years. Itsfounder, John Lowell (1743–1802), was a legislator and judge. Thecity of Lowell, MA was named in honor of his son Francis Cabot Lowell(1775–1817), a textile manufacturer.

variants.name: Love
meanings: English: from a Middle English personal name derived from the Old English female name Lufu ‘love’, or the masculine equivalent Lufa. Compare Leaf 2.

English and Scottish: nickname from Anglo-Norman French love ‘she-wolf’ or simply ‘wolf’, the word love being a back-formation from the diminutive forms lovel and lovet ‘little wolf’. See also Low 3, from Anglo-Norman French lou, the more usual form of the word.
Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Fhionghuin (see McKinnon ).

variants.name: Loveall
meanings: English: presumably a variant of   Lovell  , or possibly a habitational name from Lovehall in Tayside.

variants.name: Lovewell
meanings: English (mainly Norfolk): from Middle English love ‘love’ (Old English lufian ‘to love’) + wel ‘well’ (Old English wel), presumably denoting a lover or philanderer. There may have been some confusion with Lovell .

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Lovell was born in 1413, in Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir John Lovell, was 38 and her mother, Eleanor la Zouche, was 53. She married Anders Pedersen Gyldenstierne a.k.a. Sir Andrew Ogarde about 1433, in Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1460, in Buckinghamshire, England, at the age of 47.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice Lovell est née en 1413, à Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir John Lovell, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Eleanor la Zouche, avait 53 ans. Elle a épousé Anders Pedersen Gyldenstierne a.k.a. Sir Andrew Ogarde environ 1433, à Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1460, à Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 47 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice Lovell 1413 in Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John Lovell 38 und ihre Mutter Eleanor la Zouche 53. Sie hat um 1433 in Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom Anders Pedersen Gyldenstierne a.k.a. Sir Andrew Ogarde geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1460 im Alter von 47 Jahren in Buckinghamshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Lovell è nata il nel 1413 nel Buckinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir John Lovell, aveva 38 anni e sua madre, Eleanor la Zouche, aveva 53 anni. Lei sposato Anders Pedersen Gyldenstierne a.k.a. Sir Andrew Ogarde circa 1433, nel Buckinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1460, nel Buckinghamshire, England, all'età di 47 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice Lovellが1413年にイギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir John Lovellは38歳，母Eleanor la Zoucheは53歳であった。約1433年にイギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアでAnders Pedersen Gyldenstierne a.k.a. Sir Andrew Ogardeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1460年にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアで47歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Lovell(이)가 1413년 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John Lovell(은)는 38세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Eleanor la Zouche(은)는 53세였다. 그녀는 대략 1433년 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르에서 Anders Pedersen Gyldenstierne a.k.a. Sir Andrew Ogarde(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1460년 영국 벅잉함실르에서 47세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Lovell nasceu em 1413, em Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir John Lovell, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Eleanor la Zouche, tinha 53 anos. Ela casou-se com Anders Pedersen Gyldenstierne a.k.a. Sir Andrew Ogarde aproximadamente 1433, em Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1460, em Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, com 47 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Lovell родилась в 1413 г. в местности буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir John Lovell было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Eleanor la Zouche, 53. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Anders Pedersen Gyldenstierne a.k.a. Sir Andrew Ogarde около 1433 г. в местности буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1460 г. в местности буккингхамшир, Англия в возрасте 47 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alice Lovell nació en 1413, en Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir John Lovell, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Eleanor la Zouche, tenía 53 años. Se casó con Anders Pedersen Gyldenstierne a.k.a. Sir Andrew Ogarde aproximadamente 1433, en Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1460, en Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 47 años.
